metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex skills for X (Twitter) growth: single-tweet writing, long-form thread building, AI-tell humanizer with bundled pre-publish audit, viral hook extraction, reply and quote-tweet drafting, and weekly content planning. Tweets and threads publish through the Publora API.

plugins.name: x-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 6 X (Twitter) marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex with X-native hook formulas, single-tweet and auto-thread writing, a unified humanizer (rewrite plus `--mode audit` pre-publish check), viral hook extraction, reply and quote-tweet drafting, and a weekly content planner. Tweets and threads ship via Publora, which auto-splits long content into numbered threads.
